reviews.comment:
Reiterando el mismo problema. Si pagás con la app no te hacen factura A. La verdad que no entiendo a los ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Repeating the same problem. If you pay with the app, they don't issue you an A-bill. I honestly don't understand ACA.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio y atención, lamentablemente no tenían muchos productos de la full para comer, por lo que dijeron no está entregando el proveedor. Hay buenas alternativas en sandwichs. Sanitarios muy limpios y provistos

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and attention. Unfortunately, they didn't have many of the full menu items for lunch, so they said the supplier wasn't delivering. There are good sandwich options. The restrooms are very clean and well-equipped.
